Low volume ranging ahead Thursday pivot - Intraday post (03/Dec)

Weekly post:

Pivotal weeks ahead - Weekly post (1-5/Dec)

New post about Bitcoin for the next 5 years:

Bitcoin analysis for the next 5 year

I also want you to remember that I dropped an educational post about the intraday posts:

A Guide to Reading My Daily Posts

And I opened a “Guestbook” thread, where you can share your experiences, advices, testimonials regarding my substack with others…

We have PMI today

But the pivotal day is still ahead tomorrow, as marked in the weekly post. The thin book exposes the spot to a high volatility risk into Thursday/Friday window. Exactly what the weekly positioning told us.

Ok, now lets jump into the daily positioning breakdown…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

At the first glance you can tell that tailedness will be suppressed heavily especially to the upside. Downside volatility is heavily sold, while upside vol is flat, forming a net negative speed profile with net negative gamma. This means, that market expects downside to remain well-supplied, while they don’t expect squeezes to the upside, rather ranging with slight positive drift.

The centroid range is at 6805.76 - 6822.67This is also a very sticky zone, supplied with a local fly spread.

Downside pivot is at 6796.75with downside target of 6784.96, but very low probability that it will be hit.

Upside pivot is at 6865.60with upside target of 6884.99, also a pin.Also unlikely, especially after 1.30PMbefore that, it has a slight chance only if RV is down at the pivot while call skew keeps being bid. Other wise the spot will just range around the centroid.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

What market expects is ranging in the centroid range with slight upside skew towards the pivots, potentially finishing around 6840.
